import { codeAnchor, codeAnchorId, ref } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

// The same anchor id reified from a second site (L2 — ambiguity is loud): both sites are
// reported and neither enters the graph.
export const secondDuplicateBinding = codeAnchor({
  id: codeAnchorId("impl:orders.duplicate-binding"),
  satisfies: ref("spec:orders.duplicate-target"),
});
